description: Medical & Certificate Tracker — tracks medical certificate dates, classes, BasicMed eligibility, limitations, and special issuances with expiration alerts

hard_stops.label: Medical Certificate Expired
hard_stops.logic: Pilot's medical certificate has expired per 14 CFR 61.23 duration rules — cannot exercise pilot privileges

hard_stops.label: Operating Beyond Class Privilege
hard_stops.logic: Pilot is exercising privileges that require a higher class medical than currently held (e.g., first class privileges on a second class medical)

hard_stops.label: BasicMed Not Eligible for Part 135
hard_stops.logic: Pilot holds BasicMed but is assigned to Part 135 operations — BasicMed is not valid for Part 135

soft_flags.label: Medical Expiring Within 60 Days
soft_flags.logic: Pilot's medical certificate expires within 60 days — schedule AME appointment

soft_flags.label: Special Issuance Renewal Needed
soft_flags.logic: Pilot has a special issuance medical that requires periodic renewal documentation to the FAA

soft_flags.label: BasicMed Course Expiring
soft_flags.logic: Pilot's BasicMed online medical education course expires within 60 days — must complete renewal course
